<!-- Describe what you want added or changed -->

<!-- Who benefits, what problem does it solve -->

<!-- Other distros/tools that do this well, screenshots, links -->


## Priority
<!-- Pick one: Must-have for v1 / Nice-to-have / Future idea -->
